name: Google Workspace Accounts Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects active google_workspace accounts using personal email domains instead of corporate identity domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.primary_email AS email FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.primary_email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate account identities to corporate domains and disable personal-domain access where not explicitly approved.
